purpose: Citable reference to the SbD-ToE Manual snapshot concomitant with KG v1.2 (this repository). Allows external readers (paper8 publish bundle, future cycles, MCP consumers) to locate the exact Manual state deposited alongside the Cycle B frozen ceremony 2026-05-12.

ontology.name: SbD-ToE Manual Ontology
ontology.format: semi-formal YAML (OWL+SHACL formalisation deferred to Stream 2)

archive.note: figshare deposit deferred to a separate programme-lead workflow. Two-service archive rule (PROGRAMME-PRESERVATION-PROTOCOL.md §5.5) governed at programme level; not a KG-side action.

narrative_pointer: Snapshot do Manual SbD-ToE no momento da Cycle B frozen ceremony (2026-05-12). Commit 455124a1 é Run 2 HEAD, fechando o trabalho substantivo de Cycle B Manual content (4 iterções + 2 runs: rastreabilidade-regen → AI/ML prose extension → entity-first regenerate → richness extension → §26 methodology refresh + V2 vocab integration → achievable-maturity + 50-ameacas-mitigadas enrichment). Para o closure brief consolidado ver DevelopmentGovernance/docs/cycle-b-frozen-state-consolidated.md @ db60b1b.

provenance.architecture_rationale: KG-derivative — ref ao Manual concomitante pertence ao KG porque o KG é derivativo do Manual; concomitância é natureza própria do KG. Per ADR-0004 (KG repositioning as manual compilation backend).
